title: asplenium celtibericum subsp. celtibericum
intro: Asplenium celtibericum subsp. celtibericum, also known as the Iberian spleenwort, is a species of fern found in the Iberian Peninsula, characterized by its dark green, lanceolate fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Asplenium celtibericum subsp. celtibericum are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. This fern can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
